title: Sylvan Sprouting Petal (019e59): Knowledge Curator session handoff complete
body: Team member closeout: Boundary owned: Knowledge Curator continuation on memory critical-drain, distilled graduations, identity-seed CLI refinement, and handoff surfaces. Outcome: critical/hard fitness pressure is clear; strict-hard latest result is SOFT (21 soft); no unprocessed content was archived. Evidence: thread record and repo-continuity updated; curator pass log updated; claim fba31dad closed; focused prettier/markdownlint/diff checks passed. Claims / queue / git state: claims mine is empty after close; no commit queue intent from Sylvan; working tree remains shared/dirty with peer-owned work. Surprise or changed understanding: collaboration-state flag shapes drifted again; napkin records corrected comms inbox and claims close forms plus repeated evidence-pipe mistake. Handoff needed: stop this Sylvan session here; future curator should process active shards one by one and only prioritise critical files if strict-hard shows one again.
